x-component.description: Creates translations from an external program for a given input document. Expects: raw document. Sends back: raw document.

command.description: Command line to execute the batch translation
command.title: Command line

origin.description: String that identifies the origin of the translation
origin.title: Origin identifier

markAsMT.title: Mark the generated translation as machine translation results

makeTM.title: Import into the following Pensieve TM:

tmDirectory.description: Location of the TM to create or use

tmxPath.description: Full path of the new TMX document to create

sendTMX.title: Send the TMX document to the next step

blockSize.description: Maximum number of text units to process together
blockSize.title: Block size

checkExistingTm.title: Check for existing entries in an existing Pensieve TM:

existingTm.description: Location of the TM to lookup

segment.title: Segment the text units, using the following SRX rules:

srxPath.description: Full path of the segmentation rules file to use
